title: fagelia tomentosa
intro: Fagelia tomentosa, also known as Fagelia, is a plant species that belongs to the family Lamiaceae. Fagelia tomentosa has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Fagelia tomentosa include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as cough and congestion. Fagelia tomentosa can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
